examples: Cheerleading is a sport in itself.
Cheerleading is not just about cheering.
Cheerleading practice special shouts, dances, and athletic shows.
His cheerleading of the company's stock while knowing of an impending billion-dollar writedown is seriously incriminating.
Bounding all over Asia with an exuberance that approaches a frenzy, he's a one-man cheerleading team.
